message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Authorization token with auth_code

box "K8S_ZONE"
participant "bff_web_api" as bff
participant "authorization_api" as auth
database "k8s_redis" as redis
end box

participant "web" as web

note left of web
Reuest header
Content-Type: application/json

Request body
– auth_code: xxxxxx
end note

web -> bff : /api/v1/auth/token

note left of bff
Request header
Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

Request body
– auth_code

note:
– handler late limit (brute force attack)
end note

bff -> bff : validate request

bff -> auth : /api/v1/oauth/token

auth -> auth : validate request

auth -> redis : check auth_code from k8s_redis

note right of redis
Key:
– auth_code

Redis object
– user_id
– scope
end note

redis --> auth : return redis object

note left of auth
Access token:
{
  **header**
  – alg: rsa256
  – typ: JWT

  **payload**
  – iss
  – Jti
  – user_id
  – iat
  – exp
  – roles

  **signature**
}
end note

auth <-- redis : generate JWT Token with private key

note left of auth
ttl: 300000 milliseconds (5 min)

Key: user_id:xxxxx

Redis object value:
– access_token
– refrech_token
end note

auth -> redis : put user session into k8s_redis

redis --> auth : save data

auth --> bff : return

note left of bff
**Response header**
Content-Type: application/json

**Response body**
– accessToken
– RefreshToken
end note

bff --> web : return

@enduml
```
